summary: Determines the character encoding for a valid media type string, returning an explicit charset, a text default, or false.
signature_intent: Accepts one value expected to be a media type string and returns a charset string or false.
behavior: Returns false for missing or non-string input.
Looks up a known media type case-insensitively.
Returns the known charset when one is defined.
Returns UTF-8 for recognized text media types without a known charset.
Returns false when no charset can be determined.
edge_cases: Known media types without charset only default to UTF-8 when they are text types.
Case differences in the media type do not prevent known-type lookup.
